item_text: utente creato?: if "yes", then createuser; if "no", then no
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-createuser-001 title: successful user creation module: create user source pages: 2 preconditions: user has not registered yet. test data: username = "newuser", password = "newpassword", email = "newuser@example.com" test steps: 1. enter "newuser" as the username. 2. enter "newpassword" as the password. 3. enter "newuser@example.com" as the email. 4. click the create user button. expected result: user is created successfully and redirected to the login page.

item_text: no -> accesso a menu laterale
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-checkcandidatelist-001 title: check candidate list module: check candidate list source pages: 13 preconditions: user has a candidate list. test data: candidateid = 1 test steps: 1. enter "1" as the candidateid. 2. click the check candidate list button. expected result: candidate list is checked successfully and redirected to the main menu.

item_text: si -> eseguire il logout?
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: successful login module: login source pages: 1 preconditions: user has registered and provided correct credentials. test data: username = "testuser", password = "testpassword" test steps: 1. enter "testuser" as the username. 2. enter "testpassword" as the password. 3. click the login button. expected result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the main menu.

item_text: creazione annuncio? -> si: createnoticeboard
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-createnoticeboard-001 title: successful creation of noticeboard module: create noticeboard source pages: 9, 11 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: title = "test noticeboard", description = "this is a test noticeboard." test steps: 1. enter "test noticeboard" as the title. 2. enter "this is a test noticeboard." as the description. 3. click the create noticeboard button. expected result: noticeboard is created successfully and redirected to the main menu.

item_text: creazione avvenuta? -> si: noticeboardcreated
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-createnoticeboard-001 title: successful creation of noticeboard module: create noticeboard source pages: 9, 11 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: title = "test noticeboard", description = "this is a test noticeboard." test steps: 1. enter "test noticeboard" as the title. 2. enter "this is a test noticeboard." as the description. 3. click the create noticeboard button. expected result: noticeboard is created successfully and redirected to the main menu.

item_text: selezionare filtri: no -> listnofilter; si -> filter
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-filterannouncements-001 title: successful filtering of announcements module: filtraggio annunci source pages: 1 preconditions: user has created an announcement. test data: category = "electronics" test steps: 1. enter "electronics" as the category. 2. click the filter announcements button. expected result: announcements are filtered successfully and redirected to the main menu.

item_text: filter: no -> filtro corretto? -> viewnoticeboard; si -> listwithfilter

item_text: create user -> notify user exists
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-notifyuserexists-001 title: notification of existing user module: notify user exists source pages: 10 preconditions: user has tried to create a user with an existing username. test data: username = "existinguser", password = "newpassword", email = "existinguser@example.com" test steps: 1. enter "existinguser" as the username. 2. enter "newpassword" as the password. 3. enter "existinguser@example.com" as the email. 4. click the create user button. expected result: an error message is displayed indicating the username already exists.
